entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region in Africa south of the Sahara where rain-fed agriculture is the dominant source of staple food production

entities.name: RAIN-FED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural systems that rely solely on rainfall for water and serve as a livelihood foundation for the rural poor

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The requirement for stable and sufficient food production to meet the needs of the population

entities.name: PRODUCTION UNCERTAINTY
entities.description: Unpredictability in agricultural output associated with rainfall variability

entities.name: RAINFALL VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in the amount and timing of rainfall between and within seasons

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in climate patterns predicted to increase rainfall variability

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION AND MAPPING
entities.description: Tools and approaches used to understand and visualize the agricultural implications of climate variability

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Tailored approaches developed to manage the risks associated with climate variability

entities.name: INVESTMENT INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Targeted agricultural investments designed for biophysical and economic success in the context of climate variability
